title: Yekkow's Simplicity
description: A modpack full of mods I can't live without and or really enjoy.
body: I got the urge to make this modpack after a recent playthrough of All the Mods 9. I realized that there is a list of mods that I can't live without which make Minecraft one million times better for me and wanted to share that with everyone. (Please not there are a few mods in here a friend asked me to add)
